name: math-tools
description: v0.1.0: Scaffolding for academic math article editing — covers 4 scopes: (1) propositions extraction + R1-R8 mechanical validation (validate-propositions.py with normalize_for_match resilient substring containment, R1 prop-subset / R2 cite-resolve / R3 DAG / R6 sentence-clause-index / R7 UUID v7 / R8 unique-ids); (2) proofread workflow — JSONL-driven L1-L5 + location-drift 6-layer per-prop checklist (.proofread/<file>.md atomic granularity, 286-prop full-manuscript walk demonstrated); (3) manuscript audit R1-R4 with PR-side CI gate (audit-symbols / audit-citations / audit-code-manuscript per manuscript-consistency-audit.md SOP); (4) cross-doc sync rules — manuscript-jsonl-sync (prop-level main.tex <-> jsonl), manuscript-consistency-audit (audit-time SOP), code-and-manuscript-sync (repo-level cluster PR scope). Dogfood origin: PsychQuantHsu/psychophysical_representations #107 proofread workflow experiment (3 pilots, 5 findings shipped). v0.1.0 ships skeleton SKILL.md bodies + 3 frozen baseline rules; skill execution bodies + scripts remain in source repo until per-skill iteration extracts them. Use /plugin-tools:plugin-update math-tools after each skill body refinement.
